action.proof_term:
intro N hN
  have hcop : ∀ A C u v : ℕ, u * A = v * C + 1 → Nat.Coprime A C := by
    intro A C u v hrel
    apply Nat.coprime_of_dvd'
    intro p hp hpA hpC
    have hpUA : p ∣ u * A := Dvd.dvd.mul_left hpA u
    have hpVC : p ∣ v * C := Dvd.dvd.mul_left hpC v
    have hpVC1 : p ∣ v * C + 1 := hrel ▸ hpUA
    exact (Nat.dvd_add_right hpVC).mp hpVC1
  let M := N - 1
  have hNM : N = M + 1 := by dsimp [M]; omega
  have h504 : 504 * N - 1 = 504 * M + 503 := by dsimp [M]; omega
  have h360 : 360 * N - 1 = 360 * M + 359 := by dsimp [M]; omega
  have h280 : 280 * N - 1 = 280 * M + 279 := by dsimp [M]; omega
  have h252 : 252 * N - 1 = 252 * M + 251 := by dsimp [M]; omega
  have h57 : 900 * N * (504 * N - 1) =
      (1260 * N + 1) * (360 * N - 1) + 1 := by
    rw [h504, h360, hNM]
    ring
  have h59 : 350 * N * (504 * N - 1) =
      (630 * N + 1) * (280 * N - 1) + 1 := by
    rw [h504, h280, hNM]
    ring
  have h510 : 1 * (504 * N - 1) =
      2 * (252 * N - 1) + 1 := by omega
  have h79 : 980 * N * (360 * N - 1) =
      (1260 * N + 1) * (280 * N - 1) + 1 := by
    rw [h360, h280, hNM]
    ring
  have h710 : 588 * N * (360 * N - 1) =
      (840 * N + 1) * (252 * N - 1) + 1 := by
    rw [h360, h252, hNM]
    ring
  have h910 : 9 * (280 * N - 1) =
      10 * (252 * N - 1) + 1 := by omega
  exact ⟨
    hcop _ _ (900 * N) (1260 * N + 1) h57,
    hcop _ _ (350 * N) (630 * N + 1) h59,
    hcop _ _ 1 2 h510,
    hcop _ _ (980 * N) (1260 * N + 1) h79,
    hcop _ _ (588 * N) (840 * N + 1) h710,
    hcop _ _ 9 10 h910⟩

intro N hN
  have hcop : ∀ A C u v : ℕ, u * A = v * C + 1 → Nat.Coprime A C := by
    intro A C u v hrel
    apply Nat.coprime_of_dvd'
    intro p hp hpA hpC
    have hpUA : p ∣ u * A := Dvd.dvd.mul_left hpA u
    have hpVC : p ∣ v * C := Dvd.dvd.mul_left hpC v
    have hpVC1 : p ∣ v * C + 1 := hrel ▸ hpUA
    exact (Nat.dvd_add_right hpVC).mp hpVC1
  let M := N - 1
  have hNM : N = M + 1 := by dsimp [M]; omega
  have h504 : 504 * N - 1 = 504 * M + 503 := by dsimp [M]; omega
  have h360 : 360 * N - 1 = 360 * M + 359 := by dsimp [M]; omega
  have h280 : 280 * N - 1 = 280 * M + 279 := by dsimp [M]; omega
  have h252 : 252 * N - 1 = 252 * M + 251 := by dsimp [M]; omega
  have h57 : 900 * N * (504 * N - 1) =
      (1260 * N + 1) * (360 * N - 1) + 1 := by
    rw [h504, h360, hNM]
    ring
  have h59 : 350 * N * (504 * N - 1) =
      (630 * N + 1) * (280 * N - 1) + 1 := by
    rw [h504, h280, hNM]
    ring
  have h510 : 1 * (504 * N - 1) =
      2 * (252 * N - 1) + 1 := by omega
  have h79 : 980 * N * (360 * N - 1) =
      (1260 * N + 1) * (280 * N - 1) + 1 := by
    rw [h360, h280, hNM]
    ring
  have h710 : 588 * N * (360 * N - 1) =
      (840 * N + 1) * (252 * N - 1) + 1 := by
    rw [h360, h252, hNM]
    ring
  have h910 : 9 * (280 * N - 1) =
      10 * (252 * N - 1) + 1 := by omega
  exact ⟨
    hcop _ _ (900 * N) (1260 * N + 1) h57,
    hcop _ _ (350 * N) (630 * N + 1) h59,
    hcop _ _ 1 2 h510,
    hcop _ _ (980 * N) (1260 * N + 1) h79,
    hcop _ _ (588 * N) (840 * N + 1) h710,
    hcop _ _ 9 10 h910⟩

verification_layers.policy: Per-layer verification status is additive metadata: a kernel-verified root theorem does not imply every layer is verified, and layer completeness never gates certification.
